description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a rectangular central screen flanked by two detachable controllers, one blue and one red. The front features a large display with a colorful graphic and the words 'Trap Nation' visible, surrounded by a black bezel. The left controller is blue and includes a joystick and several buttons, while the right controller is red with its own joystick and button array. The back is mostly matte black with a vertical gray strip and visible ventilation grilles, as well as the colored backs of the controllers. The device is slim, with a profile that shows the controllers protruding slightly from the main body. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a combination of plastic and electronic components.
description: A handheld gaming console with a large central screen, blue and red detachable controllers, and a sleek black body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a colorful graphic and both blue and red controllers attached.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the protrusion of the red controller.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back, a gray strip, ventilation grilles, and the colored backs of the controllers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the protrusion of the blue controller.
